# Real Massage Embassy & Spa

> Premium massage and wellness studio with two locations, offering massage therapy, teeth whitening, rejuvenating facials, body exfoliation, pedicure, and manicure services.

## Pages
- [Home](https://spa-30p.pages.dev/): Overview of services, therapists, and locations

## Locations
- Ugbolokposo: King Jackson Hotel (opposite Bedouin Hotel)
- Orerokpe: Dorvile Hotel

## Contact
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/+2348133435521
